name: Polyethylene glycol 400
description: Polyethylene glycol 400 (PEG 400) is a low-molecular-weight grade of polyethylene glycol with low toxicity. It is strongly hydrophilic, which makes it an useful ingredient in drug formulations to enhance the solubility and bioavailability of poorly water-soluble drugs. It is used in ophthalmic solutions for the relief of burning, irritation and discomfort due to dryness of the eye.
